frameworks.name: ISO/IEC 27001 Alignment Baseline
frameworks.description: Starter mapping for core governance, change control, auditability, and retention readiness.

controls.title: Role boundaries and least privilege
Trusted publication and change governance
Tamper-evident auditability and evidence export
Retention and disposition lifecycle

frameworks.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework Alignment Baseline
frameworks.description: Starter mapping for role activation, event logging, session hardening, and recovery continuity.

controls.title: Governed role activation and switching
Detectable and explainable event logging
Session and access-token hardening
Recovery readiness and backup continuity

frameworks.name: SOC 2 Controls Alignment Baseline
frameworks.description: Starter mapping for logical access, change management, oversight, and audit retention.

controls.title: Logical access and segregation of duties
Controlled role publication and trusted changes
Monitoring, auditability, and evidence retention
Human oversight over sensitive outcomes

frameworks.name: PDPA Governance Baseline
frameworks.description: Starter mapping for purpose boundaries, sensitive review, retention governance, and auditable processing.

controls.title: Purpose-bound role scope and governed access
Human review for sensitive or safety-oriented contexts
Retention, legal hold, and lifecycle governance
Auditable processing and evidence export

frameworks.name: Thai Banking Governance Starter Profile
frameworks.description: Starter mapping for Thai financial institutions that need stronger cyber resilience, third-party model governance, and auditable approval boundaries.
frameworks.advisory_notice: Template only. Validate the final control set with internal compliance, legal, and regulator-facing teams before production use.

controls.title: Governed approval boundaries for sensitive banking workflows
Approved model-provider path with explicit runtime readiness
Auditable event chain and exportable evidence
Recovery continuity and runtime resilience

frameworks.name: Thai Government Governance Starter Profile
frameworks.description: Starter mapping for Thai government and public-sector deployments that need private hosting, audit exports, PDPA handling discipline, and approved provider paths.
frameworks.advisory_notice: Template only. Validate the final control set with information-security, data-protection, procurement, and agency approval owners before production use.

controls.title: Governed data handling and sensitive review paths
Signed publication and traceable change governance
Secure platform posture and recovery continuity
Approved AI provider path with explicit runtime readiness
